shot.title: Below the hatch
shot.intent: Turn one visible touch into a physically continuous descent.
shot.subject: the same original fictional lunar pilot
shot.action: the pilot opens the existing hatch, descends the attached ladder, and faces the seal below
shot.environment: a narrow basalt passage directly beneath the existing lunar hatch

camera.movement: hold the source angle through the opening, then pass through the same aperture behind the pilot
camera.framing: glove and hatch first, pilot small before the seal last
camera.focusBehavior: track from the glove to the opening, then hold the destination geometry readable

lighting.motivation: dying hatch light behind and a faint seal light ahead

physics: the hatch moves only on its visible hinge and the fixed ladder carries the pilot's weight

beats.action: the existing hatch visibly opens on its hinge
the same pilot passes through the opening and descends the fixed ladder
the pilot reaches the floor and faces the circular seal

continuityLocks: same white EVA suit and orange shoulder tab
same rectangular hatch dimensions and gold lever
same left glove and camera axis at the boundary
imperfectionAnchors: small dry frost flakes remain on the glove knuckles

soundDesignDirectives: heavy hinge grind, ladder contact, and controlled suit breath

contract.exactFinalFrame: the pilot's left glove rests on the gold lever of the rectangular black-glass hatch
contract.subjectReference: the same original fictional lunar pilot
preservedState: same suit and orange shoulder tab
same rectangular hatch, gold lever, ice, and camera axis

firstMotion.action: the left glove pulls the visible gold lever downward
firstMotion.visibleResult: the existing rectangular panel separates from its frame

spatialBridge.sourceGeometry: the existing rectangular hatch and its bottom hinge
spatialBridge.transitionMechanism: the same panel swings inward while the camera holds the opening in view
spatialBridge.destinationGeometry: a fixed ladder bolted directly beneath that opening
spatialBridge.cameraPath: passes through the same rectangular aperture behind the pilot

physicsInvariants: frost breaks into small dry grains and settles
the door retains fixed dimensions and one visible hinge
contract.finalFrameHandoff: hold the pilot facing the circular seal from behind
